summary: drbi.org fully migrated to Cloudflare Workers + D1 + R2 + Astro 7 and verified live. Passwordless whitelist auth (Google One Tap + email magic-link + break-glass). Secrets in CF encrypted store (nothing baked). PostHog harvested+removed, CF Web Analytics wired. Admin fully functional incl. content editors. a11y <main> landmarks sitewide. BDD gate 79/79 passing against production. 23 commits on branch migration/cf-astro7.
user_actions: add preview origin to Google OAuth client (One Tap prompt)
create CF Web Analytics site -> set PUBLIC_CF_BEACON_TOKEN
